items.title: OnlyFans owner Leonid Radvinsky dies at 43
items.dek: Leo Radvinsky became a billionaire after investing in the site, known for its pornographic content.

items.title: Nigerian police arrest 15 after viral videos of alleged sexual assault at festival
items.dek: The videos sparked widespread anger, leading to the hashtag #StopRapingWomen to trend on social media.

items.title: What we know about the LaGuardia Airport crash
items.dek: Two pilots have died after a passenger plane collided with a fire truck at New York's LaGuardia Airport.
items.body: Two pilots have died after a passenger plane collided with a fire truck at New York's LaGuardia Airport.
